---
title: "Final"
author: "Zoe Stopfer"
date: "2026-03-16"
format: html
editor: visual
---

<https://github.com/ZS-25-bit/ENVS-193DS_homework-03.git>

```{r}
#| label: Reading in packages
#| message: false
#adding in packages 
library(tidyverse) 
library(here)
library(flextable)
library(janitor)
```
